ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark type */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the benchmark */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Problem size parameter 'n' */,
  "p" INTEGER /* Number of threads parameter 'p' */,
  "f" INTEGER /* Precision parameter 'f' */,
  "dof" INTEGER /* Degrees of freedom */,
  "cell" INTEGER /* Cell size */,
  "add" INTEGER /* Number of additions */,
  "sub" INTEGER /* Number of subtractions */,
  "mul" INTEGER /* Number of multiplications */,
  "div" INTEGER /* Number of divisions */,
  "mem" INTEGER /* Memory usage in MB */,
  "byte" INTEGER /* Byte size of the problem */,
  "time" REAL /* Execution time in seconds */,
  "ninst" INTEGER /* Number of instructions */,
  "nloops" INTEGER /* Number of loops */,
  "extend_dof" INTEGER /* Extended degrees of freedom */,
  "extend_quad" INTEGER /* Extended quadratic size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the benchmark was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the benchmark was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the benchmark */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Computational architecture used */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm being benchmarked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES benchmark_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the benchmark type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the benchmark type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the benchmark type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., n, p, f) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark the result belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric being recorded */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the benchmark */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the benchmark was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the benchmark */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)
